content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom 29 (C) and all its covalent bonds. Based on the zoomed-in views from multiple angles, I can identify all the neighbour atoms of atom **C:29**.

## Results

**Molecule:** `geomconf_7704` → **geomconf_index = 7704**

**Atom 29 (C)** has the following **3 neighbour atoms** (covalently bonded):

| Atomic Index | Element | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **27** | **C** | Connected above (C:27) |
| **30** | **C** | Connected to the right (C:30) |
| **34** | **C** | Connected below-left (C:34) |

So atom C:29 is part of an aromatic ring system, bonded to three carbon atoms: **C:27**, **C:30**, and **C:34**.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 29, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
